relationships: ber:Ur ttamen yiwen yesɛan nnig simraw n yiseggasen
ber:Win yesɛan kraḍt n tmerwin n yiseggasen ur meɣɣer ara aṭas
ber:Sami yedder deg yiwet n tmurt yesɛan idles d anesbaɣur
ber:Layla tella d tamsaltut yesɛan aṭas n termit
ber:Skura d timsusmert yesɛan tarmit d tameqrant aṭas
ber:Nekkenti d timsusemrin yesɛan tarmit d tameqrant aṭas
ber:Nekk d timsusmert yesɛan tarmit d tameqrant aṭas
ber:Nekk d imsusmer yesɛan tarmit d tameqrant aṭas
ber:Nettat d timsusmert yesɛan tarmit d tameqrant aṭas
